backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the service desk backend with CRUD operations for clients, jobs, parts, labor rates, and user profiles, protected by role-based access control using a mixin and an owner principal check.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing each page, component, hook, and config file in the app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, primary, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'Reliable Home Appliance Repair LLC Service Desk' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the TanStack Router route tree with all app routes including dashboard, clients, jobs, invoice, calendar, inventory, settings, login, and profile setup, then renders the RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component with a sticky header, scrollable main content area, and a fixed bottom navigation bar with five tabs (Dashboard, Clients, Jobs, Inventory, Settings), handling auth-based redirects.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profiles, roles, clients, jobs, and labor rates, plus a utility hook to check if the current user is the owner principal.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Weekly calendar view that displays jobs on their scheduled dates, allowing navigation between weeks and clicking jobs to view details, with status badges and Google Maps links.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDetailPage.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a single client record, supporting fields like name, phone, address, email, and Google review URL, with delete confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Lists all clients with a search filter and provides navigation to create a new client or edit an existing one via card-based UI.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard overview page showing metric cards for job counts by status and total clients, a recent jobs list, and labor rates summary, with greeting personalized to the logged-in user.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryPage.tsx: Displays and manages a parts inventory list with search, add, inline edit, and delete functionality, including low-stock highlighting and owner-only access controls.
frontend/src/pages/InvoicePreviewPage.ts: Renders a printable/downloadable invoice preview for a specific job, pulling job, client, and labor rate data and generating a styled HTML invoice document.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Provides a create/edit form for individual jobs, supporting fields like client, notes, waiver type, maintenance package, and status, with delete capability.
frontend/src/pages/JobsPage.tsx: Lists all jobs grouped by status (Open, In Progress, Complete) as clickable cards showing client name, notes, and date, with a button to create new jobs.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Renders the Internet Identity login screen with branding, handling login/logout flow and redirecting authenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/ProfileSetupPage.tsx: One-time profile setup page that prompts a newly authenticated user to enter their name and saves it before redirecting to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Admin-only settings page that allows managing user roles (assign/revoke) and labor rates (create, edit, delete) with forms, dialogs, and loading states using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to clean sensitive params from the URL bar.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH color tokens, Inter/Rajdhani fonts, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state document tracking the ICP/Motoko + React service desk app's architecture, owner principal, existing features, and known issues across incremental build iterations.
